categoryGroups.name: Jesus, Gospels, and Acts
categoryGroups.description: Covers the canonical Gospels, Acts, major New Testament figures, and traditions about Jesus' life, teachings, death, burial, and resurrection.

categoryGroups.name: Paul and the Epistles
categoryGroups.description: Covers Paul's life, mission, communities, letters, theology, ethics, and the broader collection of New Testament epistles.

categoryGroups.name: Hebrew Bible and Early Judaism
categoryGroups.description: Covers Hebrew Bible texts, traditions, historical questions, and the early Jewish context for Jesus and early Christianity.

categoryGroups.name: Early Christianity and Church History
categoryGroups.description: Covers Christian origins, the development of early Christianity, church fathers, persecution, martyrdom, and church history after the New Testament period.

categoryGroups.name: Non-Canonical Texts and Heresy
categoryGroups.description: Covers non-canonical Christian writings, Gnostic texts, heresy, and early Christian traditions outside the New Testament.

categoryGroups.name: Manuscripts, Canon, and Translation
categoryGroups.description: Covers how biblical texts were copied, collected, canonized, translated, and reconstructed from manuscripts and other textual witnesses.

categoryGroups.name: Authorship, Forgery, and Methods
categoryGroups.description: Covers questions about who wrote biblical and early Christian texts, how traditions were transmitted, how scholars evaluate sources, and forgery.

categoryGroups.name: Theology, Belief, and Supernatural Claims
categoryGroups.description: Covers theological beliefs and religious questions, including Christology, salvation, faith, doubt, miracles, visions, and other claims about divine or supernatural activity.

categoryGroups.name: Afterlife, Apocalypticism, and Suffering
categoryGroups.description: Covers ancient and Christian views of the end times, resurrection, heaven and hell, divine judgment, suffering/evil, and life after death.

categoryGroups.name: Ancient World and Social Issues
categoryGroups.description: Covers the ancient social, cultural, and political world around biblical texts, including Roman context, ethics, wealth and poverty, gender, and sexuality.

categoryGroups.name: Books, Media, and Blog Features
categoryGroups.description: Covers Bart's books, teaching, media appearances, scholarship, public engagement, blog features, personal posts, and the In a Nutshell series.
